app_release_notes: v1.2.23 - You can now rename a load from the Targets tab (right-click the load's header line). Renaming also shows up right away now - the Loads and Targets tabs refresh when you switch to them, so a new name appears immediately.

mac.app_release_notes: v1.2.23 - You can now rename a load from the Targets tab (right-click the load's header line). Renaming also shows up right away now - the Loads and Targets tabs refresh when you switch to them, so a new name appears immediately.

windows.app_release_notes: v1.2.22 - Fixed a crash when deleting target photos from the right-click menu in Libraries (your scored results were never affected). Also, renaming a saved load now updates its name everywhere - the Loads tab and Targets tab always agree.
